decision_channel: Cowork production-readiness session; owner selected disposition A (accept empty-scope not-applicable)
scope: Production PHOTOS binding bucket 'activityradar-photos' verified empty at 0 objects / 0 bytes per production-r2-inventory-preflight-2026-07-17.json. There is no production R2 payload to export, sample, or retrieve today.
